# Transcrição: 0. Introduction

## [00:00 - 00:31]

You don't have to be a genius to know that the close is virtually everything. Let's get this started with this chapter where you're going to learn about the winner's exchange, vital, vital formula. You're going to learn about the importance of the close, the cost of the close to you and your company that you have never evaluated. You're going to learn when you don't close why, you're going to learn when you get told know why and how to turn those no's into yes's, how to turn a contact into a contract.
